parameters.jsCode:
// Exact keyword signals from DealHunter requirements doc
const queries = [
  { q: 'site:linkedin.com/posts "looking for a tech partner"', type: 'linkedin_posts' },
  { q: 'site:linkedin.com/posts "need a development team"', type: 'linkedin_posts' },
  { q: 'site:linkedin.com/posts "evaluating vendors"', type: 'linkedin_posts' },
  { q: 'site:linkedin.com/posts "building MVP"', type: 'linkedin_posts' },
  { q: 'site:linkedin.com/posts "looking for technical cofounder"', type: 'linkedin_posts' },
  { q: 'site:linkedin.com/posts "RFP for software"', type: 'linkedin_posts' },
  { q: 'site:linkedin.com/posts "need AI development" OR "need machine learning"', type: 'linkedin_posts' },
  { q: 'site:linkedin.com/posts "outsource development" OR "looking for agency"', type: 'linkedin_posts' },
  { q: 'site:linkedin.com/posts "need custom software" OR "outgrown no-code"', type: 'linkedin_posts' },
  { q: 'site:linkedin.com/posts "computer vision" OR "automation" "looking for"', type: 'linkedin_posts' },
  { q: 'site:linkedin.com/jobs "contract" "AI" OR "machine learning" OR "automation"', type: 'linkedin_jobs' },
  { q: 'site:linkedin.com/jobs "freelance" "software development" OR "full stack" OR "python"', type: 'linkedin_jobs' },
  { q: 'site:linkedin.com/jobs "project" "AI engineer" OR "ML engineer" OR "data engineer"', type: 'linkedin_jobs' },
];
return queries.map(q => ({ json: q }));

parameters.subject: =🔗 LinkedIn Lead [{{ $('Parse Outreach Draft').item.json['overall_score'] || $('Parse Outreach Draft').item.json['Overall Score'] }}] - {{ ($('Parse Outreach Draft').item.json['title'] || $('Parse Outreach Draft').item.json['Title'] || '').substring(0,60) }}
